ORDER DENYING MOTION TO EXTEND TIME FOR FILING AND MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX COSTS OF DEFENDANTS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF WENJIE HUA'S MOTION TO EXTEND TIME FOR FILING AND MOTION TO STRIKE OR TAX COSTS - THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION TO EXTEND. UNDER CRC 3.1700(B)(3), THE COURT HAS THE POWER TO EXTEND THE TIME TO FILE A MOTION TO TAX. THAT MEANS THAT THE PLAINTIFF NEEDED TO SEEK AN EXTENSION BEFORE THE TIME TO FILE A MOTION TO TAX LAPSED. THERE IS NO AUTHORITY THAT ALLOWS THE COURT TO REVIVE THE ABILITY TO FILE A MOTION TO TAX ONCE THE TIME PERIOD LAPSES. THIS CONCLUSION IS REINFORCED BY CRC 3.1700(B)(4), WHICH STATES THAT THE CLERK "MUST IMMEDIATELY" ENTER THE COSTS ON THE JUDGMENT WHEN THE TIME PERIOD HAS PASSED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302/AJR

PLAINTIFF SHALL DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPT. 302 (EVEN THOUGH THE MOTION WILL BE HEARD IN DEPT. 318, THE PAPERS SHOULD STILL BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 302), WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 13, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Extend Time For Filing And Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - WENJIE HUA, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. CORINNA E. MEISSNER OF HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-288-9800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WENJIE HUA's Motion To Extend Time For Filing And Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs - The court denies the motion to extend. Under CRC 3.1700(b)(3), the court has the power to extend the time to file a motion to tax. That means that the plaintiff needed to seek an extension before the time to file a motion to tax lapsed. There is no authority that allows the court to revive the ability to file a motion to tax once the time period lapses. This conclusion is reinforced by CRC 3.1700(b)(4), which states that the clerk "must immediately" enter the costs on the judgment when the time period has passed. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ajr
